zh.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安
zh.Seagrave, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福
zh.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser是Sir Hugh le Despenser和Mary de Quincy的女兒，於大約1182年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾。她和Stephen de Segrave至少有1個兒子。她去世於1241年在英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福享年60歲。

zh-hans.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: 英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾維沙安
zh-hans.Seagrave, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser是Sir Hugh le Despenser和Mary de Quincy的女儿，于大约1182年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾。她和Stephen de Segrave至少有1个儿子。她去世于1241年在英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser was born about 1182, in Leicestershire, England as the daughter of Sir Hugh le Despenser and Mary de Quincy. She had at least 1 son with Stephen de Segrave. She died in 1241, in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser est née environ 1182, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, fille de Sir Hugh le Despenser et Mary de Quincy. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Stephen de Segrave. Elle est décédée en 1241, à Seagrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser wurde um 1182 in Leicestershire, England, als Tochter von Sir Hugh le Despenser und Mary de Quincy geboren. Sie hatte mit Stephen de Segrave mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1241 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser è nata il circa 1182 nel Leicestershire, England come figlia di Sir Hugh le Despenser e Mary de Quincy. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Stephen de Segrave. Morì nel 1241, nel Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイア
ja.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャム
ja.Seagrave, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブ
ja.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenserは約1182年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでSir Hugh le DespenserとMary de Quincyの娘として生まれた。彼女はStephen de Segraveとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1241年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser(은)는 대략 1182년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Sir Hugh le Despenser(와)과 Mary de Quincy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Stephen de Segrave(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 영국 레이스스터실르 시그레이브에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: Evesham, Wigreceastrescīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra filha de Sir Hugh le Despenser e Mary de Quincy. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Stephen de Segrave. Ela faleceu em 1241, em Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser родилась около 1182 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Hugh le Despenser и Mary de Quincy. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Stephen de Segrave. Она умерла в 1241 г. в местности сиграв, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rohese Despenser nació aproximadamente 1182, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Hugh le Despenser y Mary de Quincy. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Stephen de Segrave. Murió en 1241, en Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
